prompt: I have a multi-epic PRD for a user authentication system. Please turn it into implementation plans: create-plan-workspace/test-prds/multi-epic-prd.md

assertions.text: Plan contains all 12 mandatory ExecPlan sections
Progress section uses checkbox format (- [ ] or - [x])
Plan is self-contained with no external references
Plan uses concrete repository-relative file paths
Plan includes exact runnable shell commands
Validation is phrased as observable behavior
Technical terms (Prisma, JWT, RS256, bcrypt, ORM) are defined in plain language
